problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
